name: SIQ section_drafts schema
description: CFO-style section drafts for SIQ v1.1. The visible report must render narrative_blocks; legacy fact/calculation/judgement/risk arrays are retained only for compatibility and validation.

visible_render_contract.rule: Markdown and HTML must render section-specific block titles from narrative_blocks. The legacy arrays must not be rendered as repeated visible subheadings across every chapter.

narrative_block_contract.title: Section-specific CFO analysis action, for example 财务健康度速览, 收入与现金流匹配度, 杜邦分析, 自由现金流, 主要风险链条.
narrative_block_contract.items: Evidence-bound bullets or short paragraphs. Each block should perform the action named by its title, not merely relabel facts.
narrative_block_contract.role: Optional machine hint: diagnosis, table, bridge, model, risk_chain, scenario, tracking, evidence.

legacy_field_contract.facts: Compatibility field for evidence-bound observations or explicit data gaps.
legacy_field_contract.calculations: Compatibility field for ratios, yoy changes, model outputs, or model downgrade statements.
legacy_field_contract.judgements: Compatibility field for analytical interpretation separating facts, calculations, and hypotheses.
legacy_field_contract.risks_or_improvement_conditions: Compatibility field for risk chains, improvement triggers, falsifying evidence, or review gates.
legacy_field_contract.evidence_ids: Evidence identifiers or explicit missing markers such as market_data:missing; no invented PDF page or table index.
legacy_field_contract.review_required: Boolean marker for sections that need human/model review before being considered final.
legacy_field_contract.missing_fields: Concrete data fields missing from the checkpoint, empty only when the section is sufficiently supported.
